name: LENT 04 [B]

lectionary.gospelTitle: For God So Loved the World

readings.summary: After seventy years, the Israelites are released to rebuild the temple.

readings.citation:
Ps 137:1-2, 3, 4-5, 6, R. v.6ab
Let my tongue be silenced, if I ever forget you!
readings.antiphon:
Ps 137:1-2, 3, 4-5, 6, R. v.6ab
Let my tongue be silenced, if I ever forget you!

readings.summary: Salvation is not earned but a gift from God.

God so loved the world that he gave his only Son,
so everyone who believes in him might have eternal life.

antiphons.text:
Jerusalem is built as a city bonded as one together.
It is there that the tribes go up, the tribes of the Lord,
to praise the name of the Lord.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon | For Jn 9:11, 38 (Man Born Blind)
antiphons.text:
The Lord anointed my eyes: I went, I washed,
I saw and I believed in God.

planningNotes: Laetare Sunday - Choir wear rose pink!
